channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ludvig Aberg, Lanto Griffin share lead after fierce coastal wind interrupts Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Ludvig Aberg and Lanto Griffin shared the lead Thursday at Torrey Pines in the Farmers Insurance Open after ferocious wind forced an 86-minute delay and prevented dozens of players from finishing the second round.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Welcome to the mobile age: NFL conference title games filled with dual-threat QBs
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen loves retelling the story of how he screwed up on what may go down as the NFL’s signature highlight of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Profar agrees to $42M, 3-year contract with Braves, a year after getting $1M deal with Padres
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jurickson Profar agreed to a $42 million, three-year contract with the Atlanta Braves on Thursday, less than a year after the outfielder got a $1 million deal from the San Diego Padres with spring training already underway.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake adds striker Ariath Piol to attacking lineup from Australia A-League
item.description: Real Salt Lake is adding firepower to its attacking lineup, announcing on Thursday the club has signed 20-year-old Australian striker Ariath Piol to the team.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: NFL Most Valuable Player finalists revealed, with Bay Area native Goff making the cut
item.description: No 49ers were named finalists for any major awards after a disappointing 6-11 season, but one Raider made the cut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Sports radio legend thinks Melania Trump is 'stunning' but no fan of her hat at inauguration
item.description: Sports radio legend Mike Francesa reacted to first lady Melania Trump's outfit on Inauguration Day, saying he loved her style but was no fan of that hat.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oakland Roots soccer team eyes short-term home at Coliseum
item.description: (BCN) -- The Oakland Roots professional soccer team wants to continue playing at the Coliseum for the "short-term" following the 2025 season, according to team officials.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles 11-year-old pulls one-of-a-kind baseball card
item.description: An 11-year-old baseball card collector from Los Angeles just pulled what is likely the most important card they will ever pull. Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed Tuesday morning that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked. The card features the patch that the 2023 No.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9

item.title: Run, Eagles, run: Massive plays on the ground power Eagles to NFC Championship Game
item.description: These Philly Snow Birds had cause for celebration -- they will host the NFC championship game Sunday against Washington, after the Commanders upset No. 1 seed Detroit on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past St. Louis, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller had a goal and three assists to help the Utah Hockey Club defeat the St. Louis Blues 4-2 at Delta Center on Saturday. Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists, and Connor Ingram made 22 saves for Utah (19-19-7), which had lost three straight.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 56, La Costa Canyon 51
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls Basketball on Wednesday evening part of girls and boys doubleheader for league action. Camille Dake, Senior from RBV lead the way for the Longhorns. Great game that ended with the home team winning 56-51.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
